name: Electrical & Computer Engineering (Erstwhile Electrical Engineering)
vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based department of Electrical & Computer Engineering that others would wish to emulate.
mission: Creating Exuberant Electrical & Computer Engineering Professionals.

labs.name: Research & Project Lab
labs.description: Cost: ₹2,74,040 | Equipped with advanced computer systems and projector for research, hardware design, and student capstone projects.

labs.name: Network Lab
labs.description: Cost: ₹5,75,493 | Features 22 computer stations running Ubuntu, equipped with SCILAB, MATLAB, and open source PCB design software.

labs.name: Digital Electronics Lab
labs.description: Cost: ₹4,95,753 | Features bridge rectifiers, thyristors, light dimmers, muffle furnaces, m-c-s kits, and 555 timer timing circuit analyzers.

labs.name: Electrical Machine Lab
labs.description: Cost: ₹29,33,548 | Equipped with VFD control panel, 3-phase lamp banks, thyristor DC supplies, resistive loads, and retardation test setups.

labs.name: Switch Gear & Protection Lab
labs.description: Cost: ₹16,27,518 | State-of-the-art workstations for distance, differential, over-current, and motor protection systems demonstration.

labs.name: Basics of Electrical Engineering Lab
labs.description: Cost: ₹11,16,380 | Contains Norton/Thevenin/Superposition theorem kits, AC circuits testing, and gate logic circuit boards.

alumni_testimonial.name: Fayyaz Ahmed Shaikh
alumni_testimonial.quote: I owe my success to the department's exceptional teaching and career support. Industry-relevant projects and workshops enhanced my problem-solving skills.
